repair_candidate.summary: Repair contributor PR #61322 so stale same-agent absolute sessionFile paths are remapped relative to the active sessionsDir, including non-default session stores, then validate the focused sessions tests and changed-file checks.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(sessions): respect active session store when remapping stale paths
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- Repairs source PR #61322 by preserving the same-agent stale path remap while anchoring it to the active sessionsDir, including custom session stores.
- Keeps the contributor's regression coverage focused on cross-root sessionFile remapping.
- Carries source PR attribution for @rbutera.

## Source and Credit
- Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/61322
- Linked issue context: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/61321
- Credit: @rbutera provided the original narrow fix direction and test coverage.

## Validation
- pnpm test:serial src/config/sessions.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed
credit_notes: Credit @rbutera for the source PR #61322 and the original same-agent cross-root session path repair direction.
